creator: billf@jade.chc-chimes.com
text:
On Tue, 10 Aug 1999 jesusr@freebsd.org wrote:

> bash-1.14.7-13.i386.rpm
> ELF interpreter /compat/linux/lib/ld-linux.so.2 not found
> execution of script failed
> error: /usr/ports/distfiles/rpm/bash-1.14.7-13.i386.rpm cannot be installed
> *** Error code 1
> 
> Stop.
> *** Error code 1
> 
> Stop.
> *** Error code 1

Seems to be pretty messed up for a port that "still installs fine".
